LanguageData.TSOA_SeveringSuccess: {0_nameDef} has completed performing {RITUAL_definite} ritual successfully. For the next {1} days, all colonists will be psychically deafened.
LanguageData.TSOA_SeveringFailure: {0_nameDef} has completed performing {RITUAL_definite} ritual, but failed to control it. For the next {1} days, all colonists will be psychically deafened.
LanguageData.TSOA_FeverSuccess: {0_nameDef} has completed performing {RITUAL_definite} ritual successfully. For the next {1} days, the ritual targets will experience psychic fever.
LanguageData.TSOA_FeverFailure: {0_nameDef} has completed performing {RITUAL_definite} ritual, but failed to control it. For the next {1} days, the ritual targets will experience psychic fever.
